title: Indulgent Australian Salmon Curry
description: A rich, malty curry featuring flaky salmon and savory fish sauce, perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic, ginger, and red curry paste, cooking until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk, fish sauce, tamarind paste, and brown sugar; stir to combine and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the diced salmon fillets to the sauce, covering them completely, and simmer for 5 minutes until the salmon is cooked through.
Stir in the fresh lime juice and half the cilantro, then taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve the curry hot over a bed of steamed jasmine rice, garnished with the remaining cilantro.
Leave the dish to rest for 2 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
Enjoy the malty, dense, midnight-craving Australian salmon curry with a side of crisp lettuce if desired.
